question_text: Light travels from air into a glass block. Which statement correctly describes what happens to the light?

options.label: A
options.text: The light speeds up and bends away from the normal

options.label: B
options.text: The light slows down and bends towards the normal

options.label: C
options.text: The light slows down and bends away from the normal

options.label: D
options.text: The light continues at the same speed and does not bend

explanation: When light enters a denser material like glass from air, it slows down because the material has a higher refractive index. As light slows down, it bends towards the normal (the perpendicular line to the surface). This is refraction.
